blended.narrative: Bretton Woods is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
